name: ComsPlus
description: Local privacy display names and Globed-backed ComsPlus chat.

privacy-enabled.name: Use fake name locally
privacy-enabled.description: Replaces your own visible name locally where ComsPlus can safely identify it.

fake-name.name: Fake name
fake-name.description: Local display name. This does not change your Geometry Dash or Globed account.

chat-enabled.name: Enable ComsPlus chat
chat-enabled.description: Shows the in-level ComsPlus chat overlay when Globed is available.

hide-bubble-main-menu.name: Hide bubble in main menu
hide-bubble-main-menu.description: Keeps the floating ComsPlus bubble out of the main menu.

open-chat-keybind.name: Open chat
open-chat-keybind.description: Keyboard shortcut for opening ComsPlus chat on desktop.

chat-name-mode.name: Chat display name
chat-name-mode.description: Auto uses the fake name only when local privacy is enabled.

send-cooldown-ms.name: Send cooldown
send-cooldown-ms.description: Minimum delay between outgoing chat messages in milliseconds.
